questions.question: What does 'slicked' mean in the context of hair styling?
options: A) Wet and messy
B) Smooth and neatly styled
C) Curly and voluminous
D) Dyed in bright colors
questions.explanation: 在这个美妆教程中，'slicked' 指的是将头发梳得光滑平整，例如 'slicked up' 表示把头发向后梳得光滑整洁，这是 'clean girl' 发型的典型特征。

questions.question: In the video, what does the speaker mean by 'ride or die'?
options: A) A product that is very cheap
B) A product the speaker cannot live without
C) A product that expires quickly
D) A product for sensitive skin
questions.explanation: 'Ride or die' 是一个俚语，表示非常重要、离不开的人或事物。在这个上下文中，美妆博主说她使用的 Kylie lip and cheek glow balm 是她的 'ride or die'，意思是这是她每天必用的产品，离不开它。

questions.question: What is 'blending' in makeup terminology as used in this video?
options: A) Mixing different foundations together
B) Smoothly spreading and merging makeup products
C) Adding more product to a specific area
D) Removing makeup completely
questions.explanation: 在美妆教程中，'blending' 指的是将化妆品平滑地晕开、融合，使其过渡自然。视频中提到 'with the blending for blush'，意思是她正在晕开腮红，使其看起来自然。

questions.question: What does 'overlining lips' mean in this tutorial?
options: A) Applying lip balm on lips
B) Drawing the lip liner slightly outside the natural lip line
C) Wearing lipstick inside the mouth
D) Removing old lip makeup
questions.explanation: 'Overlining' 是一种化妆技巧，指的是将唇线画在自然唇线之外，以使嘴唇看起来更饱满。视频中提到 'taking a darker lip liner and overlining my lips'，就是这个意思。

questions.question: What is the main characteristic of 'clean girl' makeup according to this video?
options: A) Heavy contouring and dramatic eyes
B) Bold red lipstick
C) Minimal, natural-looking with glowing skin
D) Dark smoky eyeshadow
questions.explanation: 视频中描述 'clean girl' 妆容是 'girls with perfect glossy glowy skin just looking absolutely Flawless with minimal makeup'，即完美有光泽的皮肤，看起来无瑕，妆容 minimal（minimal makeup）即简约自然的妆容。

questions.question: What does the speaker suggest about using powder products in this tutorial?
options: A) Use powder for full coverage
B) Avoid heavy powder, prefer cream/liquid products
C) Apply powder before primer
D) Use powder on eyebrows
questions.explanation: 视频中提到 'I'm going to stick to a majority of like cream liquid products' 以及 'liquid products are so much better'，博主建议尽量使用 cream（膏状）和 liquid（液体）产品，而不是粉状产品，以保持妆容的自然感。

questions.question: What is a 'scrunchie' used for in this hair tutorial?
options: A) Cleaning hair
B) Pulling hair up into a bun or ponytail
C) Dying hair
D) Curling hair
questions.explanation: 'Scrunchie' 是一种发圈，通常用于扎头发。视频中多次提到 'I'm going to grab my scrunchie and pull my hair up'，意思是使用发圈把头发扎起来。

questions.question: What does 'get the hang of' mean in this context?
options: A) Get rid of something
B) Learn how to do something properly
C) Hang something on the wall
D) Lose interest in something
questions.explanation: 'Get the hang of' 是固定搭配，意思是 '掌握、学会（某事）'。视频中说 'anyone can rock you know once you get the hang of it'，意思是任何人都可以驾驭这个造型，一旦你学会了技巧。

questions.question: What is the function of 'brow gel' as shown in the video?
options: A) To fill in sparse eyebrows
B) To brush and set eyebrows in place
C) To remove eyebrows
D) To color eyebrows
questions.explanation: 视频中 'I'm now just taking a brow gel and really brushing my brows up and out'，说明 brow gel（眉毛胶）的作用是梳理眉毛，将其固定在一定位置，使眉毛看起来更整齐有形。

questions.question: What does 'rock' mean in the phrase 'anyone can rock this look'?
options: A) To wear a rock/stone
B) To successfully wear or pull off a style
C) To shake the body
D) To play music
questions.explanation: 'Rock' 在口语中表示 '驾驭、成功展示（某个造型）'。'Anyone can rock this look' 意思是任何人都能驾驭这个造型，都适合这个妆容。

questions.question: What is 'setting spray' used for in makeup?
options: A) To remove makeup
B) To make makeup last longer and stay in place
C) To hydrate the skin
D) To clean makeup brushes
questions.explanation: Setting spray（定妆喷雾）的作用是固定妆容，让妆面更持久。视频中提到 'there is no other setting spray or any spray like this'，说明这是用于定妆的重要产品。

questions.question: What does the speaker mean when she says 'embrace the flaws'?
options: A) Cover up all imperfections with makeup
B) Accept and be comfortable with natural imperfections
C) Remove all blemishes from skin
D) Apply more concealer on flaws
questions.explanation: 'Embrace the flaws' 意思是接受并拥抱自己的不完美。视频中说 'makeup is very minimal so it is important to embrace the flaws'，意思是既然妆容很淡，就应该接受自己原本的样貌，不要力求完美。

questions.question: What is 'highlighter' used for in this clean girl makeup look?
options: A) To contour the face
B) To add shine/glow to high points of the face
C) To cover dark circles
D) To fill in eyebrows
questions.explanation: Highlighter（高光）用于提亮面部的高光区域，如颧骨、鼻梁、眉骨等，使皮肤看起来有光泽感。视频中反复提到高光产品，用于打造 'glowy' 有光泽的妆效。

questions.question: What does 'lifted' refer to when describing the makeup result?
options: A) Raised eyebrows
B) Face looking more lifted/youthful
C) Hair pulled up high
D) Eyes open wider
questions.explanation: 视频中多次提到 'look at how lifted this side looks'，'honestly lifted my face so much'，指的是通过化妆技巧（如下高光、腮红位置）让面部看起来更紧致、更年轻、更有立体感。

questions.question: What type of products does the speaker recommend for achieving a natural look?
options: A) Powder-based products
B) Cream and liquid products
C) Water-based products only
D) Matte products
questions.explanation: 视频中明确提到 'I'm going to stick to a majority of like cream liquid products'，博主建议使用膏状和液体产品，因为它们更贴合皮肤，能打造自然有光泽的妆容效果。

questions.question: What is the 'wing liner' mentioned in the video?
options: A) A type of setting spray
B) Eyeliner that extends outward at the corner
C) Lip liner
D) Eyebrow liner
questions.explanation: 'Wing liner' 指的是 '眼线' 的一种画法，即在眼角向外延伸，形成翅膀般的形状。视频中说 'since we aren't wearing a wing liner today'，说明她们今天不画这种外眼线。

questions.question: What does the speaker say about using this hairstyle for 'greasy end of the week pre wash hair'?
options: A) This hairstyle works well for day-old unwashed hair
B) You must wash your hair before this style
C) This style makes hair more greasy
D) This hairstyle requires freshly washed hair
questions.explanation: 视频中说 'this hairstyle is great for like greasy end of the week pre wash hair'，意思是这个发型非常适合周末前头发变油、还没洗头的时候，说明这个 slicked 发型可以掩盖油腻的头发。

questions.question: Describe the key steps to achieve the 'clean girl' makeup look based on the video. What products and techniques are mentioned?
questions.explanation: 这是一道口语表达题，要求学生根据视频内容描述 'clean girl' 妆容的关键步骤和使用的技巧及产品。
questions.referenceAnswer:
1. Hair: slicked back/sleek style using scrunchie, hair slicker
2. Skin: minimal, natural, glowy skin with light concealer
3. Cheeks: blush and highlighter for glowy effect
4. Lips: lip balm, lip liner for overlining
5. Brows: brow gel to brush brows up and out
6. Products: mainly cream/liquid products, minimal powder
7. Setting: setting spray to lock the look
questions.hint: Think about: hair preparation, skin base, cheek products, lip care, eyebrows, and final setting step

questions.question: What does the speaker mean by 'minimal makeup'? Explain the philosophy behind this makeup style.
questions.explanation: 这是一道口语理解题，要求学生解释 'minimal makeup' 的含义以及这种妆容风格的理念。
questions.referenceAnswer: Minimal makeup means using very little makeup products to enhance natural beauty rather than covering it up. The philosophy behind 'clean girl' aesthetic is: 1) embrace natural skin texture and imperfections 2) use products that enhance rather than mask 3) aim for a fresh, youthful, 'glowy' appearance 4) keep it simple and easy for everyday routine
questions.hint: Consider: natural vs. dramatic, embracing flaws, simplicity, everyday wearability

questions.question: Why does the speaker recommend cream and liquid products over powder products for this look? Explain the reasoning.
questions.explanation: 这是一道口语表达题，要求学生解释为什么博主推荐使用膏状和液体产品而不是粉状产品。
questions.referenceAnswer: The speaker prefers cream and liquid products because: 1) they provide more natural finish 2) they blend better for a seamless look 3) they create the desired 'glowy' effect 4) they don't strip moisture from the skin 5) they work better for the minimal/no-makeup makeup look 6) powder can look too heavy or cakey
questions.hint: Think about: natural finish, blending, glowy skin effect, moisture, overall look

questions.question: What are the benefits of the hairstyle shown in this tutorial? For what occasions or hair conditions is it suitable?
questions.explanation: 这是一道口语表达题，要求学生根据视频描述这个发型的优点以及适合的场合和发质条件。
questions.referenceAnswer: Benefits: 1) keeps hair away from face 2) looks sleek and polished 3) easy to do 4) professional and neat appearance. Suitable for: 1) 'greasy' day-old hair that needs hiding 2) everyday routine 3) quick polished look 4) warm weather when hair might get in the way 5) minimal effort styling
questions.hint: Consider: practical benefits, hair conditions mentioned, ease of maintenance

questions.question: What does the speaker imply when she says 'there is no other setting spray or any spray like this'?
options: A) Setting spray is not important
B) This particular setting spray is unique and essential
C) She doesn't use setting spray
D) All setting sprays are the same
questions.explanation: 这是夸张的表达，意思是这个定妆喷雾非常好用，无可替代。视频中说 'do without this spray there is no other setting spray or any spray like this'，暗示这是她最爱用的定妆产品，效果独一无二。

questions.question: In the context of this video, what does 'flawless' skin mean?
options: A) Skin with many blemishes covered
B) Skin that looks perfect and smooth
C) Skin treated with laser
D) Skin that needs no skincare
questions.explanation: 'Flawless' 意思是完美无瑕的。视频中描述 'clean girl' 妆容是 'girls with perfect glossy glowy skin just looking absolutely Flawless'，指的是皮肤看起来完美光滑，有光泽但无明显瑕疵。

questions.question: What is the purpose of using a 'hair slicker' in this tutorial?
options: A) To curl the hair
B) To smooth down baby hairs and flyaways
C) To add volume to hair
D) To dye the hair
questions.explanation: Hair slicker（梳子）用于梳理头发。视频中 'I'm taking this little hair Slicker I'm just brushing down any of my baby hairs'，意思是使用小梳子梳理碎发，使发型更整洁光滑。
